# Sample-data sandbox

## When to use

Use when value can be experienced with fake data.

## Why it works

Lets buyer verify safely.

## Mechanism

Reduces privacy and setup friction.

## Required inputs

Demo account, sample project, guided checklist.

## When not to use

If sample data does not match real complexity.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Sandbox starts, first-value event, activation.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
